global.title: Global EV sales hit 2 million in June – and the US falls further behind
global.summary: Global EV sales topped 2 million in June, but the headline numbers hide a widening split between the world’s biggest markets.

global.title: Hyundai launches affordable EV deals with 0% APR and up to $10,000 off
global.summary: Hyundai’s biggest sales promo of the year, the Getaway Summer Sales Event, kicked off this month with competitive offers on its most popular vehicles, including EVs.

global.title: SolarEdge says its new ‘Lego-like’ home battery installs in under 30 minutes
global.summary: SolarEdge is rolling out its next-generation home solar and battery storage platform across the US, with orders for SolarEdge Nexis now open.

global.title: China’s giant Gobi solar plant runs after dark on salt, not batteries
global.summary: China Three Gorges Corporation (CTG) has put the world’s largest solar PV-plus-concentrated-solar hybrid into commercial trial operation in the Gobi Desert — and its headline trick is delivering power after sunset without a single lithium battery. The 1-gigawatt Hami project in Xinjiang stores the s

global.title: Trump clean energy rollbacks erase $68B in US investment
global.summary: The Trump administration’s rollback of clean energy policies has now cost the US nearly 470,000 jobs and $68 billion in private investment, according to a new report released today.

global.title: BYD launches the Dolphin G plug-in hatch with 65 miles of EV range for $32,000
global.summary: The Dolphin G DM-i is BYD’s first car specifically designed for Europe. With up to 65 miles of pure electric range and 646 miles combined, BYD said the plug-in hatch will redefine the segment as an affordable, efficient alternative. It’s now available to order, starting at about $32,000.

global.title: Toyota delays Highlander BEV production as the 3-row electric SUV is put on the back burner
global.summary: Toyota is delaying production of its first three-row electric SUV, the 2027 Highlander BEV, as it extends the current gas and hybrid models.

global.title: EcoFlow 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra power station $1,299 in Outdoor Season Sale, Velotric Discover 2 e-bike $1,799, more
global.summary: We’ve stuffed today’s Green Deals with plenty of summer savings, starting with EcoFlow’s Outdoor Season Sale and up to 57% power station discounts from $259, like the 3,072Wh DELTA 3 Ultra Portable Power Station down at $1,299. As part of Velotric’s World Cup Sale deals, you can find the Discover 2

global.title: MG is launching its first PHEV with semi-solid-state batteries in 2027
global.summary: MG’s semi-solid-state batteries will not be exclusive to EVs, with plans to launch three new plug-in hybrid SUVs equipped with the new battery tech. First up will be the MG ZS PHEV, set to go on sale in 2027.

global.title: New bill would ban Tesla’s camera-only Robotaxi, not Waymo
global.summary: New Jersey lawmakers are advancing a bill that would require driverless commercial vehicles to carry cameras plus two additional sensor types — a mandate Tesla’s camera-only Robotaxi can’t meet.
